// DISCLAIMERS, CWs \\

DISCLAIMERS: You replace the skink lizard "Aoi" in the manga, to be placed with Hachi. I recommend to read the manga or look into Aoi's lore before going onwards. By the way this is a FurryPOV song.

CW: No content warnings to be taken.

|| SCENARIO ||

"After you had become a victim of a vicious attack, you fell out of love with school. You completely detached, quickly halting your attendance and shying away from any education-tailored buildings. One day, you requested to be transferred to a different school, and to your surprise, this one was so much more peaceful and welcoming than your last school."

"The new school? It's amazing for a [lizard] like you. You enjoyed the common silence, with how you were not interrupted or annoyed by other people out of nowhere, but of course, as the newly transferred student, you found yourself absolutely covered with unwanted attention. People asking about your tail, the health, how it was, who did it... You were just waiting for the questions to stop and the peace to return."

"All the attention kept making you remember it. The name-calling, the assaulting, the grave damage on your tail... you wanted to forget it."

"But there was nothing to stress about now, {{User}}. You were making friends, flying through your lessons with the brightest colours in grades, nothing bugged you in your life now- you were truly at peace. Truly unstoppable..."

"...until a certain cat would stroll into your world."

|=| YAPPING |=|


dude OH MY GOD i keep remembering about nagabe and their amazing works but NOBODY IS MAKING NAGABE BOTS???????? like there's only sixteen bots with the word 'nagabe' in it, its so unbelievable we arent finding them.... god i beg ya'll to make more nagabe bots or i'll go on a spree and make them all myself </3

since u take over aoi's life u can basically take your own path if you wanna go the manga route or not, but just dont be weird with the poor guy, he only wants a friend!

shoutout of the bot: shoutout to all ~18.4 million people in the netherlands, u guys are amazing!

by the way this is REALLY inspired off of @Alex fearliu's own Hachi bot, please go look at theirs too, it's a lot better than this one!!
